descriptions.text: Learn real dance moves and participate in mini-games to earn money to buy new clothes and accessories. Hone your skills until you're ready to perform on the biggest stage of all to become the No. 1 Ballerina!

The Diva Girls - Kelly, Gabrielle, Madison and Alyssa - are back and dreaming of becoming ballerinas - but they'll have to study hard at Ballet School before taking to the stage. An all-new Diva Girl story with new characters to meet and locations to explore Redesigned rhythm-action controls for more precise dance moves Earn money in minigames to dress up your character Challenge friends to wireless dancing competitions Swap your unlocked accessories and clothes via the wireless connection.
